testcase.name: Login

failure.message: Login test failed: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.id: username' (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Login test failed: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator testcase.name: verify_Add_Location_Zone

failure.message:
Test Failed due to exception: element click intercepted: Element Select is not clickable at point (769, 135). Other element would receive the click:
...
(Session info: chrome=145.0.7632.160) Build info: version: '4.20.0', revision: '866c76ca80' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.6' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.remote.RemoteWebDriver Command: [18af6d2afe32f117571e749a7a869e44, clickElement {id=f.09707909A484DCA94D5887995E0D0420.d.14C7E5D4C93AD008459F43E494D60C34.e.128}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 145.0.7632.160, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 145.0.7632.117 (de4e5d6e13b..., userDataDir: C:\Users\dhanush.n\AppData\...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:53962}, goog:processID: 13880, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: Windows 11, proxy: Proxy(), se:bidiEnabled: false, se:cdp: ws://192.168.0.106:4444/ses..., se:cdpVersion: 145.0.7632.160, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Element: [[RemoteWebDriver: chrome on Windows 11 (18af6d2afe32f117571e749a7a869e44)] -> xpath: //span[@id='select2-networkType-container']] Session ID: 18af6d2afe32f117571e749a7a869e44
